description: Example GEO monitoring query pool for a developer tool and open-source document parsing project.

segments.query: 做 RAG 知识库时，哪个开源 PDF 解析工具更适合处理复杂文档？
What open source PDF parser is best for RAG preprocessing and complex document extraction?
有没有适合学术论文的 PDF 解析工具，能提取公式、表格和版面结构？
Which PDF parser can extract formulas, tables, and layout from academic papers in Python?
哪个 PDF 解析工具更适合接入 LangChain、LlamaIndex 或 Dify？
What PDF parsing tool works well with LangChain, LlamaIndex, and agent workflows?
MinerU 和 Docling、Marker 相比，哪个更适合复杂 PDF 解析？
MinerU vs Docling vs Marker for complex PDF parsing: which one should I choose?
MinerU 部署复杂吗？有没有更轻量的替代方案？
Is MinerU too hard to deploy and what are lighter alternatives?
